text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 2.2 6 

FRMLRY_RX_ID 

LABEL: CCW Formulary Drug Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is a CCW-created identifier for a drug product that is found in a Part D prescription drug 
plan's formulary. Part D Plans submit their formularies to CMS and identify drug products using the 
National Library of Medicine RxNorm Concept Unique Identifiers (RXCUIs). There can be several drug
